name: azimuth-agents
description: Azimuth Agents — multi-agent ground-station network with verifiable memory on Walrus + MemWal
comment: MemWal is intentionally NOT a dependency (its Seal peer pulls @mysten/sui v2). It is dynamically imported by shared/memory.js only when MEMWAL_* env vars are set. To enable it: npm install @mysten-incubation/memwal --legacy-peer-deps
